Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the annual provider (APR) file. Each entry contains 
variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ACPTG_NEW_PTNTS_IND 

LABEL: Provider Accepting New Patients Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year
